support_service: Custom engineering and design for specific applications
details.shipping_returns: Systems are shipped in pre-fabricated sections for rapid, simple installation. Equipment designed for a twenty year life with minimal field installation labor required. Warranty details available upon request.
key_features_usps: Energy efficient with up to 40% energy reduction compared to conventional diffused aeration systems
Low maintenance design with no moving parts in jet nozzles and no small passages to clog
Optional pneumatic backflush system virtually eliminates in-basin maintenance and manual cleaning
Suitable for deep tanks up to 65 feet with high oxygen transfer efficiency
All aeration and mixing occurs below surface eliminating mist, spray, and icing problems
applications_use_cases: Activated sludge treatment in pulp and paper mills
Lagoon aeration for industrial wastewater treatment
Equalization basins and storm holding tanks
BOD and COD removal in municipal and industrial applications
regulatory_information: Designed for compliance with wastewater treatment standards
Suitable for applications requiring low VOC emissions and minimal off-gases
Achieves acceptable AOX levels in effluent for pulp and paper mill applications

technical_specifications.Nozzle Type: Double nozzle arrangement with primary inner nozzle, intermediate high shear mixing chamber, and outer secondary nozzle
technical_specifications.Flow Pattern Options: Circular flow, plug flow, bidirectional flow
technical_specifications.Operating Temperature: Designed for sub-zero to high temperature operations
technical_specifications.Materials of Construction: Fiberglass Reinforced Plastic (FRP) or Stainless Steel (316)
technical_specifications.Oxygen Transfer Efficiency: upto 5.0 lbs O2/HP-hr at standard conditions
